================================================================================================
WARNING: A possible task hung was detected for a COM-based scheduled task!
The likely culprit task is stuck on the same stack with %S.
This break is recoverable. If you let it go we will continue to wait on the task to complete.
================================================================================================

matched_strings:
======================================================================
WARNING: This is not an error but a forced debug break enabled by setting the registry key
HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\EnableDebuggerBreakForTaskStart
This break is recoverable. If you let it go we will continue starting the task.
======================================================================
